reason: The remediation modifies only the pam_pwquality configuration (difok) in /etc/security/pwquality.conf or its drop‑in directory. This is a straightforward text edit that does not require service restarts and poses no risk of locking out accounts if a reasonable value is used. It affects password policy only, which is a standard STIG hardening operation.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Improperly high difok value could prevent password changes; Incorrect syntax could cause pam_pwquality parsing errors
